title: Rewire TicketService + remaining 5 services to use repositories
description: Replace dict-based in-memory storage in TicketService, ActivityService, MarketingService, SalesService, AnalyticsService, NotificationService, and ChurnPredictionService with Repository pattern. For each service: add src/internal/repository/<name>_repository.py with GenericRepository subclass plus domain-specific finders; refactor service to call repository. All method signatures unchanged. Each service's existing test file still passes after refactor. Depends on roadmap-db-migration-09-repository-base (the GenericRepository base class must exist before any service rewire).
acceptance: All 7 services still return identical ApiResponse shapes; each has a corresponding *_repository.py file; pytest tests/unit/test_ticket_service.py tests/unit/test_activity_service.py tests/unit/test_marketing_service.py tests/unit/test_sales_service.py -v all pass; net diff under 400 lines
